curationPolicy.rightSideUse: reserved as unlabeled comparison for most bilateral anatomy
curationPolicy.statusMeaning: needs_qc means atlas-derived and not yet manually reviewed for teaching use
curationPolicy.surfaceCaveat: FreeSurfer completed, but final sphere/sphere.reg outputs reported one residual negative triangle; QC surface-derived cortical labels before teaching use.

sources.description: Subcortical and major tissue-class segmentation from recon-all.
White-matter parcellation derived from cortical labels and aseg.

sources.displayName: FreeSurfer thresholded ex vivo Brodmann areas
sources.description: Thresholded surface-projected ex vivo Brodmann/visual/MT/entorhinal labels.
Individual .label files for ex vivo, visual, fusiform, occipital, cortex, and related surface ROIs.
